name: Sassarese Sardinian

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Sassarese Sardinian (sass1235).

notes: Skeleton. Romance variety of northern Sardinia (transitional Sardo-Corsican) written in the Latin alphabet. Grapheme map follows Italian-based conventions with Sassarese specifics: the retroflex ddh/dd [ɖ], ch/gh for plain velars, gn [ɲ], sc [ʃ] and the affricate readings of c/g before front vowels. Gemination, the precise voiced/voiceless value of z and s, and context-conditioned lenition are not fully recoverable from the spelling and are left unencoded, so a PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Sassarese Sardinian (sass1235)
